BBC knew about Scott Mills sexual offences investigation in 2017The corporation also says it is "doing more work to understand the detail of what was known by the BBC". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwywvrye76lo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwywvrye76lo#0 Wed, 01 Apr 2026 12:20:51 GMT
